description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add 3 of the cheapest available 3-day festival admission passes to your cart and proceed to the checkout page.
tasks.name: Add 3 of the cheapest available 3-day festival admission passes to your cart and proceed to the checkout page.
tasks.description: Add 3 of the cheapest available 3-day festival admission passes to your cart and proceed to the checkout page.

tasks.instruction: Filter the schedule for rock performances on Saturday at the Main Stage between 6:00 PM and 11:00 PM, sort by earliest start time, and add the first three results to My Schedule.
tasks.name: Filter the schedule for rock performances on Saturday at the Main Stage between 6:00 PM and 11:00 PM, sort by earliest start time, and add the first three results to My Schedule.
tasks.description: Filter the schedule for rock performances on Saturday at the Main Stage between 6:00 PM and 11:00 PM, sort by earliest start time, and add the first three results to My Schedule.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for the newsletter using a provided email address, selecting Electronic as the only preferred genre, Friday as the only festival day of interest, a weekly update frequency, and then submit the form.
tasks.name: Sign up for the newsletter using a provided email address, selecting Electronic as the only preferred genre, Friday as the only festival day of interest, a weekly update frequency, and then submit the form.
tasks.description: Sign up for the newsletter using a provided email address, selecting Electronic as the only preferred genre, Friday as the only festival day of interest, a weekly update frequency, and then submit the form.

tasks.instruction: In the Merch T-shirts section, filter to items under $35 with a rating of at least 4 stars, sort by lowest price, open the first result, choose size M, set quantity to 2, and add it to your cart.
tasks.name: In the Merch T-shirts section, filter to items under $35 with a rating of at least 4 stars, sort by lowest price, open the first result, choose size M, set quantity to 2, and add it to your cart.
tasks.description: In the Merch T-shirts section, filter to items under $35 with a rating of at least 4 stars, sort by lowest price, open the first result, choose size M, set quantity to 2, and add it to your cart.

tasks.instruction: On the festival map, show vegetarian food vendors, sort them by distance from the Main Stage with the closest first, and save the nearest one as a favorite.
tasks.name: On the festival map, show vegetarian food vendors, sort them by distance from the Main Stage with the closest first, and save the nearest one as a favorite.
tasks.description: On the festival map, show vegetarian food vendors, sort them by distance from the Main Stage with the closest first, and save the nearest one as a favorite.

tasks.instruction: From the Accessibility information section, copy the accessibility hotline phone number, then open the Accessibility contact form and submit it using a provided email address, a subject about wheelchair access, and a message that includes the copied phone number plus a sentence requesting accessible seating near the Main Stage.

expected_values.subject: Question about wheelchair access
expected_values.message_suffix: I would like to confirm accessible seating near the Main Stage.

tasks.name: From the Accessibility information section, copy the accessibility hotline phone number, then open the Accessibility contact form and submit it using a provided email address, a subject about wheelchair access, and a message that includes the copied phone number plus a sentence requesting accessible seating near the Main Stage.

tasks.instruction: Use the FAQ search to look up refund information, open the first refund-related question, follow the link to the detailed ticket refund policy, then from that page open the refund policy section and continue on to the main Tickets selection page.

target_names: Can I get a refund for my festival tickets?

tasks.name: Use the FAQ search to look up refund information, open the first refund-related question, follow the link to the detailed ticket refund policy, then from that page open the refund policy section and continue on to the main Tickets selection page.

tasks.instruction: Filter the schedule to Sunday all-ages shows starting between 12:00 PM and 5:00 PM, sort by latest start time first, and add the show that appears first in that list to My Schedule.
tasks.name: Filter the schedule to Sunday all-ages shows starting between 12:00 PM and 5:00 PM, sort by latest start time first, and add the show that appears first in that list to My Schedule.

tasks.instruction: On the Lineup headliners section, open the first two headliner artists, determine which one is scheduled to perform on Sunday, and add only that Sunday headliner to My Schedule.
tasks.name: On the Lineup headliners section, open the first two headliner artists, determine which one is scheduled to perform on Sunday, and add only that Sunday headliner to My Schedule.
